summary: Recording praised for excellent sound quality, but no specific show details provided
review: The sole review gives the tape a solid four‑star rating and highlights the “excellent sound,” suggesting a clear and well‑balanced recording. No comments are made about the performance, setlist flow, or individual musicians, so the musical quality of this concert remains unassessed.
